en: Just straight in there, huh? Yeah. Well, you know, I'm old.
What do you want? A bit of, oh, what a nice house you got here. No. I like it.
I get bored easily. Yeah. Everything is boring, isn't it? Yeah.
Everything is pretty fucking boring. Except this.
Yeah. You got me interested. How interested? Look, I don't want to fuck around forever with this.
I mean, I've seen how your price is, and I understand that your board is looking at all the options,
but if we stay tight, this can work out.
ko: 하지만 우리가 긴밀하게 유지하면, 이건 잘 될 수 있어.

en: So, shall we dance or what?
ko: 그럼, 춤출까, 아니면 앉을래? 응, 좋아.

en: Do you want to sit down? Sure. Zuckerberg once, do you know Mark, by the way?
He once told me that in ancient Rome, at one point, they wanted to make all the slaves wear something so they could identify them.
ko: 어느 시점에 모든 노예들이 뭔가를 입게 하려 했다고 말했어.

en: Uh-huh. It's just up here. Like a, what do you call these things?
Like a cloak or whatever? But then they decided not to do it, and you know why?
Because they realized if all the slaves dressed the same, they would see how many of them there were, and they'd rise up and kill the masters.
